changes.value:
Components using `}: { ... }` anonymous inline prop types instead of named `interface FooProps` pattern:

1. `entity-inspector.tsx` — `FieldDispatch` (7 props)
2. `entity-card.tsx` — `CardFieldDispatch` (5 props)
3. `App.tsx` — `ViewRouter` (2 props), `InspectorPanel` (5 props)
4. `focus-scope.tsx` — `FocusScopeInner` (6 props)
5. `command-palette.tsx` — `ResultList` (6 props), `ResultRow` (6 props)
6. `mention-pill.tsx` — `PillInner` (7 props)
7. `grid-view.tsx` — `GridFocusManager` (3 props)
8. `command-scope.tsx` — `ActiveBoardPathProvider` (2 props)

Each should get a named `interface FooProps` co-located with its component.
Inline anonymous prop types: extract named interfaces for 10 components
